en.role: base language and canonical translation surface

ru.role: canonical development language and source surface
ru.theoretical_article_note: The supplied canonical English theoretical article is duplicated into the Russian folder as a reference surface; no separate Russian theoretical PDF was present in supplied materials.

translation_source_rule: Russian may be used as development language. Release canon is the English human-readable layer PDF; Russian PDFs, JSON, CSV and other surfaces are derived translations/projections that must be checked against it before release.
bare_physiology_scope: Bare physiology includes canonical language folders and their translated PDFs/articles; it excludes chat history, local memory, previous builds, and private user rules.
qa_boundary: QA-A/B/C/D only; QA-E field effectiveness is not claimed.

ru_canonical_article.source: operator upload in current isolated session

socrates_article_canonicalization.quality_boundary: Translation and layout were statically reviewed; human third-party linguistic certification is not claimed.

layer_human_canon_rule: For every BOIS layer, the ultimate human-readable physiological canon is the English PDF of that layer. Russian development sources and machine-readable surfaces are translations/projections and cannot override it.
